data.title: Harmonic to modernize SKY Perfect's playout-to-delivery with XOS Advanced Media Processor. Harmonic's stock symbol is HLIT.
data.description: Harmonic, a software-based media processor provider, introduces the XOS Advanced Media Processor, offering exceptional efficiency and enabling innovative business approaches. The company disclosed the partnership with SKY Perfect JSAT Corporation (SJC), a prominent satellite operator and pay-TV service provider, on September 13, 2025, in San Jose, California. Harmonic is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol HLIT. This collaboration aims to enhance media services and introduce new revenue streams in the industry, reflecting Harmonic's commitment to cutting-edge technological solutions.

data.title: 2026 Toyota Corolla Cross now available at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville in Vacaville, California.
data.description: The 2026 Toyota Corolla Cross is now available for drivers seeking a fashionable and efficient compact SUV at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville in Vacaville, California. This announcement was made by the dealership on September 13, 2025. If you are in the Vacaville area and in need of a stylish and capable compact SUV, this new model is worth considering.

data.title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff praised Palantir for its premium pricing model with a 100x revenue multiple, highlighting disparities in growth rates and market dynamics.
data.description: Salesforce Inc. CEO, Marc Benioff, praised Palantir Technologies Inc. during the Goldman Sachs Communacopia+Technology conference for their premium pricing model and market valuation. Benioff expressed admiration for the company's 100 times revenue multiple and speculated they could reach 1000 times soon. Despite the size gap between them, Salesforce's quarterly revenue exceeds $10 billion, ten times larger than Palantir's. Palantir's impressive 48% growth rate far surpasses Salesforce's 10% expansion, demonstrating market dynamics. Benioff's comments highlight the increasing acknowledgment of Palantir's market position.

data.title: US likely to establish Strategic Bitcoin Reserve in 2021, says Galaxy Digital’s Alex Thorn, market underestimating possibility.
data.description: Alex Thorn of Galaxy Digital stated that the market is not adequately valuing the chances of a US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve being established within the current year, contrary to skepticism from other individuals.

data.title: Friends of Science Society report criticizes Canadian Climate Policy for harming economy. US Endangerment Finding on CO2 impacts central bank & policies.
data.description: A recent report titled "What's Next for Canadian Climate Policy?" authored by Robert Lyman and released by Friends of Science Society sheds light on the implications of the US Endangerment Finding concerning carbon dioxide for central bank and Canadian climate strategies. The report, published in CALGARY, AB, on September 12, 2025, emphasizes the significance of this finding on governmental decisions.

data.title: AAVE set to soar past $350 with a $362 target in 7 days, showing 13.7% potential growth on breakout. Technical analysis supports bullish momentum.
data.description: The short-term price prediction for AAVE indicates a target of $362 with significant bullish momentum. Technical analysis highlights a potential 13.7% increase if the crucial resistance level is surpassed, suggesting a strong upward trend for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Harvard experiment aims to solve global debt crisis. Prof Han Feng analyzes data to guide wealth allocation during global upheaval. Part 3 of 7.
data.description: In an interview by journalist Faye Xiaofei, Professor Han Feng discussed the pressing issue of global upheaval. He emphasized the importance of looking to the stars to understand the flow of history and analyzing data to make sense of it. Professor Feng delved into a fundamental question for civilization: Amid the breakdown of traditional structures, where should society invest its resources? This thought-provoking inquiry challenges current norms and prompts a reevaluation of wealth distribution in a rapidly changing world.

data.title: LDO expected to hit $1.75-$2.10 in 30 days with MACD at 0.0095 and RSI at 56.93 signaling bullish trend. (Read More)
data.description: The latest LDO price analysis indicates a positive trend, with the MACD histogram standing at 0.0095 and the RSI at 56.93. Based on these figures, experts are predicting a price target of $1.75 to $2.10 within the next 30 days. This forecast is driven by bullish momentum in the market, as per technical analysis.

data.title: Sylogist forms special committee to engage with shareholders after OneMove Capital plans to nominate 3 directors.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on September 13, 2025, Sylogist Ltd. (TSX: SYZ), a prominent public sector SaaS company, recognized a news release by OneMove Capital Ltd. regarding their intent to call for a shareholder meeting to propose the nomination of three directors.

data.title: Predicting HBAR to reach $0.30 resistance level, showing 15-20% upside potential by October 2025 based on technical indicators.
data.description: The cryptocurrency HBAR is currently displaying a strong uptrend, aiming for a price target of $0.30 as a resistance level. Technical analysis signals a potential increase of 15-20% in the next 4-6 weeks. This momentum suggests bullish sentiment for HBAR's future trajectory.

data.title: UFCW 8-Golden State and Raley’s reach tentative agreement benefiting thousands of grocery workers in CA with wage increases, bonuses, and better benefits.
data.description: In Roseville, California, UFCW 8-Golden State has announced a tentative agreement with Raley’s, benefiting thousands of members at Raley’s, Bel Air, and Nob Hill stores in Central and Northern California. The proposed contract offers substantial wage hikes, ratification bonuses, and enhanced health care and retirement perks, along with better scheduling and job safeguards. A representative from UFCW 8 emphasized that this deal reflects the unity and determination of the members involved.

data.title: Predicted WIF price: $1.50-$1.80 by Oct 2025, expecting 56-87% gains in 4-6 weeks with bullish momentum.
data.description: Forecasting for WIF indicates a promising outlook with a potential increase of 56-87% to reach a range of $1.50 to $1.80 in the next 4-6 weeks. This projection is backed by a positive MACD trend and a significant breakout above the resistance level set by the Bollinger Bands.

data.description: Forecasters are sending mixed signals on PEPE's future price, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) currently at 66.54 indicating a possible increase to $0.0000090. However, analysts are predicting a bearish trend with a target price of $0.00000696.

Furthermore, the price is currently holding above a crucial support level at $0.25, suggesting a potential upward movement in the near future.

data.title: INJ price target: $16.50 in 30 days, bullish breakout signaled by technical indicators.
data.description: The forecast for the price of INJ indicates a target of $16.50 by mid-October 2025. The bullish MACD momentum and close proximity to the upper Bollinger Band hint at a potential breakout above the resistance level of $14.60.

data.title: Office Depot apologizes for unacceptable behavior at Michigan store (Store 3382) towards a customer.
data.description: Office Depot has expressed deep concern regarding a negative customer incident at Store 3382 in Portage, Michigan. The company has acknowledged that the behavior of their associate was unacceptable and against company policies. They have apologized for the situation and have reached out to the customer involved.

data.title: Arthur Hayes warns that expecting a Lambo right after buying Bitcoin is a risky move as values fluctuate.
data.description: Arthur Hayes has claimed that expecting to buy Bitcoin one day and acquire a Lamborghini the following day is not a prudent mindset.

data.title: Mount Logan Capital filed early warning report in connection with Business Combination involving 180 Degree Capital Corp.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, Mount Logan Capital Inc. (formerly known as Yukon New Parent, Inc.) submitted an early warning report related to the finalization of an all-stock strategic business merger between Mount Logan Capital Intermediate LLC (previously Mount Logan Capital Inc.) and 180 Degree Capital Corp. More information about the completion of this merger can be found in the press release published by Mount Logan today. The details are accessible on Mount Logan’s SEDAR+ profile.

data.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent vets Fed chair candidates, meets BlackRock's Rick Rieder. Trump looks to replace Powell by May 2026.
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent is actively screening potential candidates for the next Federal Reserve Chair as the Trump administration aims to find a replacement for Jerome Powell by May 2026. One notable contender in consideration is Rick Rieder, an executive at BlackRock Inc. (NYSE: BLK). Bessent recently held a meeting with Rieder in New York, marking the fourth candidate interview in the selection process. During the two-hour meeting, Rieder, who serves as BlackRock's Chief Investment Officer of fixed income, engaged in discussions regarding monetary policy, the Federal Reserve's organizational structure, and regulatory policies, positioning him as a promising candidate for the role. Neither the Treasury Secretary's office nor BlackRock has provided immediate comments on the matter. The administration has been narrowing down the pool of potential candidates with Bessent already conducting interviews with four individuals for the position. For further details, visit the Benzinga website.

data.title: PreVeil enhances CMMC solution with GRC tool by partnering with Ivis; specializes in compliance management.
data.description: PreVeil, a top CMMC, NIST 800-171, and ITAR compliance solution provider, has teamed up with Ivis to introduce a tailored edition of their GRC software for meeting CMMC requirements. This centralized compliance management collaboration was disclosed by PreVeil on September 12, 2025, in Boston. The alliance aims to enhance compliance efficiency by merging expertise and technology. The partnership signifies a significant move in the industry's drive for meticulous compliance, promising to streamline processes in adherence to regulations.
